directions_tried.name: Phase 1: Algebraic Decomposition (3 parallel math explorations)
directions_tried.outcome: Three complementary decompositions. Best lead: cube-face inequality (160K zero violations). Supporting: parallelogram identity, single-link theorem.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2: Proof Construction via Cube-Face Inequality
directions_tried.outcome: E004 synthesized. E005 reformulated as 3×3 matrix. E006 PROOF COMPLETE: λ_max(M_total) ≤ 64. E007 adversarial: CONDITIONAL PASS — core proof correct, Gap 1 (staggered≠full eigenspace) and Gap 2 (odd L) remain.

explorations_completed.key_finding: Single-link theorem + color-uniform density P_e P_e^T = (9/64)I_3
Cube-face grouping F_x <= 64 per vertex, proved for cross-links=I

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Synthesis of Phase 1 findings and proof design
explorations_completed.key_finding: Proof reduces to single Lemma 5. Route B (pairing) BLOCKED.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Proof attempt — cube-face inequality for general Q
explorations_completed.key_finding: Reformulated as 3×3 matrix: F_x = n^T M_total n, need λ_max(M_total) ≤ 64. Cross-link monotonicity FAILS. λ_max saturates at exactly 64 under adversarial gradient ascent.
PROOF COMPLETE: 5-step proof via trace identity (c+Tr(P)=64), algebraic factorization, Cauchy-Schwarz, AM-GM. Combined Bound Lemma is the heart. Verified on 100K+ configs.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Adversarial review of proof — independent verification
explorations_completed.key_finding: CONDITIONAL PASS: Core proof correct (all 5 steps verified independently). Gap 1: proof covers 3D staggered subspace of 9D eigenspace P, not full P. Gap 2: odd L sign structures differ. Even L fully covered.
Bound holds numerically (110K+ tests, max 15.997 < 16, 0 violations). Maximizing T NOT always rank-1 — no simple reduction. Cross term < 8.2% of f_same. No algebraic proof achieved.
